title: Add external listing link to plots99.com

requirements.summary: Add a prominent call-to-action button in the hero section directing users to the plots99.com listing
acceptanceCriteria: Link to https://plots99.com/co/HDp4JumjqHvs#info is visible in the hero section
Button or link uses premium styling consistent with Elite India brand theme
Link opens in a new tab (target='_blank' with rel='noopener noreferrer')
Call-to-action text clearly indicates the purpose of the external link

file_operations.description: Add a prominent call-to-action button or link with text 'View Full Listing' or 'Book Now on Plots99' that directs users to https://plots99.com/co/HDp4JumjqHvs#info. Position it prominently within the existing hero banner layout alongside or near the existing call-to-action buttons. Apply premium styling using the elite-gold accent color from the existing theme to maintain visual consistency. Ensure the link opens in a new tab with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer' for security.

requirements.summary: Add the plots99.com listing link to the footer contact section as an additional contact method
acceptanceCriteria: Footer includes a labeled link to https://plots99.com/co/HDp4JumjqHvs#info
Link is styled consistently with other footer contact information
Link opens in a new tab
Link label clearly identifies it as a plots99.com listing

file_operations.description: Add the plots99.com listing link to the contact section alongside the existing phone number and address. Include a clear label such as 'View Listing' or 'Plots99 Listing' with an appropriate icon (e.g., ExternalLink from lucide-react). Style the link consistently with the existing footer contact information using the same text color and hover effects. Ensure the link opens in a new tab with target='_blank' and rel='noopener noreferrer'. Place it as an additional contact method in the same contact details structure.
